resources.string: Background coordinator for cross-device LLM action protocol
Edge AI coordinator listening for actions
Each scope allows an LLM partner to fire one category of action on this device. Revoke at any time. Hitting the panic switch revokes all scopes for 24 hours.
COYL EAP coordinator. This app runs a background service that lets approved LLM partners fire actions on this device — only with your explicit scope grants.
